scripts.build: which forge > /dev/null 2>&1 && mud build || echo Skipping contracts build - Foundry not available
scripts.zone:load: echo 'ERROR: Specify environment — use zone:load:testnet or zone:load:mainnet' && exit 1
scripts.zone:load:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/zone-loader.ts'
scripts.zone:load:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/zone-loader.ts'
scripts.item:verify: echo 'ERROR: Specify environment — use item:verify:testnet or item:verify:mainnet' && exit 1
scripts.item:verify:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts'
scripts.item:verify:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts'
scripts.item:sync: echo 'ERROR: Specify environment — use item:sync:testnet or item:sync:mainnet' && exit 1
scripts.item:sync:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts --update'
scripts.item:sync:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && npx tsx scripts/item-sync.ts --update'
scripts.deploy:local: pnpm run build && DEBUG=mud:* mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow --priority-gas-price=1000000" --profile=mudFoundry
scripts.deploy:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && bash scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh beta && pnpm run build && mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow" --profile=base-mainnet --worldAddress $WORLD_ADDRESS && pnpm run ensure-access:testnet'
scripts.deploy:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && bash scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh production && pnpm run build && mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow" --profile=base-mainnet --worldAddress $WORLD_ADDRESS && pnpm run ensure-access:mainnet'
scripts.deploy:mainnet:fresh: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && pnpm run build && mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow" --profile=base-mainnet --alwaysRunPostDeploy && pnpm run ensure-access:mainnet'
scripts.genesis-message:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && cast send $WORLD_ADDRESS --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --rpc-url $RPC_URL --value 0 "0x$(printf "good luck, have fun. -mokn" | xxd -p | tr -d "\n")"'
scripts.ensure-access:testnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && FOUNDRY_PROFILE=script forge script script/EnsureAccess.s.sol --tc EnsureAccess --sig "run(address)" $WORLD_ADDRESS --rpc-url $RPC_URL --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast --slow'
scripts.ensure-access:mainnet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.mainnet && set +a && FOUNDRY_PROFILE=script forge script script/EnsureAccess.s.sol --tc EnsureAccess --sig "run(address)" $WORLD_ADDRESS --rpc-url $RPC_URL --private-key $PRIVATE_KEY --broadcast --slow'
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && DEBUG=mud:* mud deploy --forgeScriptOptions="--slow --priority-gas-price=1000000" --profile=mudFoundry
scripts.lint: pnpm run prettier && pnpm run solhint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run prettier && pnpm lint:sol-tests --fix  && yarn lint:sol-logic --fix
scripts.test:smoke: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && vitest run scripts/smoke-test/smoke.test.ts --reporter=verbose'
scripts.test:smoke:scale: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && vitest run scripts/smoke-test/scale.test.ts --reporter=verbose'
scripts.test:smoke:pvp: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && vitest run scripts/smoke-test/pvp.test.ts --reporter=verbose'
scripts.test:smoke:balance: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && vitest run scripts/smoke-test/balance.test.ts --reporter=verbose'
scripts.test:smoke:all: bash -c 'set -a && source .env.testnet && set +a && vitest run scripts/smoke-test/ --reporter=verbose --sequence.concurrent=false'
